name: Breast Cancer
description: This test case evaluates the ability to identify breast cancer cases using both active diagnostic codes and personal history codes. The phenotype requires either one occurrence of diagnostic codes OR two occurrences of history codes on distinct days. This tests the LLM's understanding of complex breast cancer phenotyping that includes both current and historical diagnoses.
prompt: Find all patients with a diagnosis of breast cancer, including both current diagnoses and personal history of breast cancer.

required_codes.display: Malignant neoplasm of unspecified site of unspecified female breast
Personal history of malignant neoplasm of breast
Personal history of malignant neoplasm of breast
